query:
SELECT 
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[104].playoffTierType') as t104,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[104].matchupPeriodId') as p104,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[104].winner') as w104,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[104].home.teamId') as h104,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[104].away.teamId') as a104,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[105].playoffTierType') as t105,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[105].matchupPeriodId') as p105,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[105].winner') as w105,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[105].home.teamId') as h105,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[105].away.teamId') as a105,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[106].playoffTierType') as t106,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[106].matchupPeriodId') as p106,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[106].winner') as w106,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[106].home.teamId') as h106,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[106].away.teamId') as a106
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2024 AND viewName = 'combined';
